---
id: bind-device
title: "Hardware Binding"
description: "Links an DataBridge or SmartLink device to the AMI Meter via Zigbee."
sidebar_label: "Hardware Binding"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/powerbox-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Hardware Binding"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/powerbox/bind"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Links an DataBridge or SmartLink device to the AMI Meter via Zigbee.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["hemProfileId","macAddress","installCode","meterId","actionCode"],"properties":{"hemProfileId":{"type":"string","description":"Customer GUID","example":"CustomerGuid"},"macAddress":{"type":"string","description":"DataBridge MAC address","example":"EB_MAC_Address"},"installCode":{"type":"string","description":"DataBridge install code","example":"EB_Install_Code"},"meterId":{"type":"string","example":"123456789"},"actionCode":{"type":"integer","description":"1 = Bind, 0 = Unbind","enum":[0,1],"example":1}},"title":"BindRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Bind request submitted successfully"},"400":{"description":"Invalid request payload"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
